revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
<!--This is transcluded into all these templates' /doc pages to save time.-->
{{navbar|Resolved/See also|plain=1}}
{{div col|colwidth=20em}}
* {{tlx|Resolved|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Unresolved|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Not sure3|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Being worked on|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|2O|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Duplicate issue|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Disregard|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Moot|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Off-topic thread|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|FYI|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Moved discussion from|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Moved discussion to|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Stale|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Stuck|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|WQA in progress|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Wrong venue|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Referred elsewhere|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Resbox|demo{{=}}y|reason{{=}}(customizable)|_show_result=y}}
{{div col end}}

===Misc===
* [[Template:Done/See also]], the large family of inline, comment-level templates (similar to the above, but with no box around them); {{tl|Resbox}} can be used to convert any of them into {{tl|Resolved}}-style hatnotes
* [[Template:Table cell templates/doc]], the family of table-specific templates that work only in tables
* [[:Category:Image with comment templates]]
* [[:Category:Resolution templates]]<noinclude>
<!-- ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc PAGE, NOT HERE, THANKS -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<!--This is transcluded into all these templates' /doc pages to save time.-->
{{navbar|Resolved/See also|plain=1}}
{{div col|colwidth=20em}}
* {{tlx|Resolved|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Unresolved|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Not sure3|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Being worked on|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|2O|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Duplicate issue|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Disregard|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Moot|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Off-topic thread|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|FYI|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Moved discussion from|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Moved discussion to|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Stale|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Stuck|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|WQA in progress|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Wrong venue|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Referred elsewhere|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Resbox|demo{{=}}y|reason{{=}}(customizable)|_show_result=y}}
{{div col end}}

===Misc===
* [[Template:Done/See also]], the large family of inline, comment-level templates (similar to the above, but with no box around them); {{tl|Resbox}} can be used to convert any of them into {{tl|Resolved}}-style hatnotes
* [[Template:Table cell templates/doc]], the family of table-specific templates that work only in tables
* [[:Category:Image with comment templates]]
* [[:Category:Resolution templates]]<noinclude>
<!-- ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc PAGE, NOT HERE, THANKS -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically made stuff
revision.text:
<!--This is transcluded into all these templates' /doc pages to save time.-->
{{navbar|Resolved/See also|plain=1}}
{{div col|colwidth=20em}}
* {{tlx|Resolved|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Unresolved|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Not sure3|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Being worked on|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|2O|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Duplicate issue|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Disregard|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Moot|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Off-topic thread|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|FYI|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Moved discussion from|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Moved discussion to|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Stale|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Stuck|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|WQA in progress|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Wrong venue|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Referred elsewhere|_show_result=y}}
* {{tlx|Resbox|demo{{=}}y|reason{{=}}(customizable)|_show_result=y}}
{{div col end}}

===Misc===
* [[Template:Done/See also]], the large family of inline, comment-level templates (similar to the above, but with no box around them); {{tl|Resbox}} can be used to convert any of them into {{tl|Resolved}}-style hatnotes
* [[Template:Table cell templates/doc]], the family of table-specific templates that work only in tables
* [[:Category:Image with comment templates]]
* [[:Category:Resolution templates]]<noinclude>
<!-- ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc PAGE, NOT HERE, THANKS -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

* [[:Category:Image with comment templates]]
* [[:Category:Resolution templates]]<noinclude>

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
